statement.en: Preliminary Screening of the Herbicidal and Fungicidal Potential of Essential Oils from Woody Pruning Biomass

proposer: Valeria Palchetti, Pierre Leonel Taguimjeu Tafokeu K, Andrea Carolina Baptista Ruiz et al.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Document is dated 2026-04-25 (future date from 2024 perspective) with 'peer reviewed' notation but categorized under cs.AI despite being an agricultural/chemical research paper. This suggests either: (1) a metadata error in a preprint system, (2) a speculative/fictional submission, or (3) a real paper with anomalous dating. The abstract content is absent, preventing direct evaluation of claims. Classification as FLOWING (provisional/not yet validated) reflects the temporal impossibility and incomplete information.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 廃棄される枝から立ち上がる油が、害を指数関数的に消す—無駄から力が生まれる。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 枝という黒い骨から、黄金の液が滲み、病気の赤い糸を切る。
